sql.where:
t.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
AND t.NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.searchKeyword}, '%')
AND a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (t.NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.searchKeyword}, '%') OR a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.searchKeyword}, '%'))
AND t.TARGET_ID IN ( WITH RECURSIVE grp_cte AS ( SELECT tgr.idx, tgr.TARGET_ID FROM pi_target_group tgr WHERE tgr.idx = #{request.groupId} UNION ALL SELECT tgr2.idx, tgr2.TARGET_ID FROM pi_target_group tgr2 INNER JOIN grp_cte ON tgr2.up_idx = grp_cte.idx ) SELECT grp_cte.TARGET_ID FROM grp_cte WHERE grp_cte.TARGET_ID IS NOT NULL )
AND t.SEARCH_STATUS = #{request.agentStatus}
AND t.PLATFORM = #{request.targetOs}

mapper.select:
SELECT t.TARGET_ID, t.NAME AS TARGET_NAME, COALESCE(a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, tg.connected_ip) AS TARGET_IP, t.PLATFORM AS TARGET_OS, t.NET_TYPE AS TARGET_TYPE, t.GROUP_ID, a.AGENT_VERSION AS AGENT_VERSION, CASE WHEN a.AGENT_CONNECTED = 1 OR a.AGENT_CONNECTED = '1' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS AGENT_STATUS, t.TARGET_USE AS USE_YN, t.REGDATE AS REG_DT, NULL AS REG_USER, NULL AS MOD_DT, NULL AS MOD_USER, COALESCE(ptg.name, '미그룹') AS GROUP_NAME, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(u.USER_NAME SEPARATOR ', ') FROM pi_target_user tu JOIN pi_user u ON tu.USER_NO = u.USER_NO WHERE tu.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID) AS ASSIGNED_USER_NAME FROM pi_targets t LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.NAME = a.AGENT_NAME AND t.AP_NO = a.AP_NO AND a.AGENT_USE = 'Y' LEFT JOIN pi_target_group tg ON tg.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND t.AP_NO = tg.AP_NO LEFT JOIN pi_target_group ptg ON tg.up_idx = ptg.idx
ORDER BY a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP IS NULL, t.NAME LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_targets t
LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.NAME = a.AGENT_NAME AND t.AP_NO = a.AP_NO AND a.AGENT_USE = 'Y'

SELECT t.TARGET_ID, t.NAME AS TARGET_NAME, COALESCE(a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, tg.connected_ip) AS TARGET_IP, t.PLATFORM AS TARGET_OS, t.NET_TYPE AS TARGET_TYPE, t.GROUP_ID, a.AGENT_VERSION AS AGENT_VERSION, CASE WHEN a.AGENT_CONNECTED = 1 OR a.AGENT_CONNECTED = '1' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS AGENT_STATUS, t.TARGET_USE AS USE_YN, t.REGDATE AS REG_DT, NULL AS REG_USER, NULL AS MOD_DT, NULL AS MOD_USER, COALESCE(ptg.name, '미그룹') AS GROUP_NAME, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(u.USER_NAME SEPARATOR ', ') FROM pi_target_user tu JOIN pi_user u ON tu.USER_NO = u.USER_NO WHERE tu.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID) AS ASSIGNED_USER_NAME FROM pi_targets t LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.NAME = a.AGENT_NAME AND t.AP_NO = a.AP_NO AND a.AGENT_USE = 'Y' LEFT JOIN pi_target_group tg ON tg.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND t.AP_NO = tg.AP_NO LEFT JOIN pi_target_group ptg ON tg.up_idx = ptg.idx WHERE t.TARGET_ID = #{targetId}

SELECT u.USER_NO, u.USER_ID, u.USER_NAME, u.USER_GRADE, u.insa_code AS TEAM_CODE, u.user_email AS EMAIL, u.user_phone AS PHONE, u.acc_yn AS USE_YN, u.logindate AS LAST_LOGIN_DT, u.regdate AS REG_DT FROM pi_target_user tu JOIN pi_user u ON tu.USER_NO = u.USER_NO WHERE tu.TARGET_ID = #{targetId} ORDER BY u.USER_NAME
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_target_user (TARGET_ID, USER_NO, USER_NAME, TARGET_USE, REGDATE, AP_NO) VALUES ( #{targetId}, #{userNo}, (SELECT IFNULL(u.USER_NAME, '') FROM pi_user u WHERE u.USER_NO = #{userNo} LIMIT 1), 'Y', NOW(), 0 )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM pi_target_user WHERE TARGET_ID = #{targetId} AND USER_NO = #{userNo}
mapper.select: SELECT t.TARGET_ID, t.NAME AS TARGET_NAME, COALESCE(a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, tg.connected_ip) AS TARGET_IP, t.PLATFORM AS TARGET_OS, t.NET_TYPE AS TARGET_TYPE, t.GROUP_ID, a.AGENT_VERSION AS AGENT_VERSION, CASE WHEN a.AGENT_CONNECTED = 1 OR a.AGENT_CONNECTED = '1' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS AGENT_STATUS, t.TARGET_USE AS USE_YN, t.REGDATE AS REG_DT, NULL AS REG_USER, NULL AS MOD_DT, NULL AS MOD_USER, COALESCE(ptg.name, '미그룹') AS GROUP_NAME, NULL AS ASSIGNED_USER_NAME FROM pi_targets t LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.NAME = a.AGENT_NAME AND t.AP_NO = a.AP_NO AND a.AGENT_USE = 'Y' LEFT JOIN pi_target_group tg ON tg.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND t.AP_NO = tg.AP_NO LEFT JOIN pi_target_group ptg ON tg.up_idx = ptg.idx WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y' AND t.NET_TYPE = 'SERVER' ORDER BY t.NAME LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_targets WHERE TARGET_USE = 'Y' AND NET_TYPE = 'SERVER'

SELECT sh.TARGET_ID AS targetId, sh.FOUND_COUNT AS detectionCount, sh.TOTAL_FILES AS fileCount, sh.FINISHED_AT AS lastScanDt FROM pi_scan_history sh WHERE sh.TARGET_ID = #{targetId} ORDER BY sh.FOUND_COUNT DESC LIMIT #{topN}
SELECT idx AS DMZ_ID, dmz_ip AS DMZ_IP, memo AS MEMO FROM pi_dmz ORDER BY memo

SELECT g.idx AS groupId, g.name AS groupName, g.up_idx AS parentId, CASE WHEN g.up_idx = '#' OR g.up_idx IS NULL THEN '최상위' ELSE IFNULL(pg.name, '-') END AS parentGroupName, g.degree AS sortOrder, g.type AS groupType, g.regdate AS regDate, IFNULL(tc.targetCount, 0) AS targetCount FROM pi_target_group g LEFT JOIN pi_target_group pg ON pg.idx = g.up_idx AND pg.type IN (99, 98) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tg2.up_idx, COUNT(*) AS targetCount FROM pi_target_group tg2 INNER JOIN pi_targets pt ON tg2.TARGET_ID = pt.TARGET_ID AND pt.TARGET_USE = 'Y' WHERE tg2.TARGET_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY tg2.up_idx ) tc ON tc.up_idx = g.idx WHERE g.type IN (99, 98) ORDER BY g.degree, g.name

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_target_group g WHERE g.type IN (99, 98)
AND g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_target_group (name, up_idx, degree, type, regdate) VALUES (#{groupName}, #{parentId}, '1', #{groupType}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT a.AGENT_VERSION AS agentVersion, COUNT(*) AS targetCount FROM pi_agents a WHERE a.AGENT_USE = 'Y' AND a.AGENT_VERSION IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a.AGENT_VERSION ORDER BY a.AGENT_VERSION DESC

SELECT t.TARGET_ID AS targetId, t.NAME AS targetName, COALESCE(a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, tg.connected_ip) AS targetIp, t.SEARCH_STATUS AS agentStatus, a.AGENT_VERSION AS agentVersion, COALESCE(ptg.name, '미그룹') AS groupName, t.REGDATE AS modDt FROM pi_targets t LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.NAME = a.AGENT_NAME AND t.AP_NO = a.AP_NO AND a.AGENT_USE = 'Y' LEFT JOIN pi_target_group tg ON tg.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND t.AP_NO = tg.AP_NO LEFT JOIN pi_target_group ptg ON tg.up_idx = ptg.idx WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y' AND t.SEARCH_STATUS IN ('ERROR', 'DISCONNECTED', 'TIMEOUT') ORDER BY t.REGDATE DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_targets WHERE TARGET_USE = 'Y' AND SEARCH_STATUS IN ('ERROR', 'DISCONNECTED', 'TIMEOUT')
SELECT d.idx AS filterId, d.memo AS filterName, 'PATH' AS filterType, d.dmz_ip AS filterValue FROM pi_dmz d ORDER BY d.idx DESC
